topic: The hidden cost of the status-check call
post:
Every "what's the status of my permit?" call costs a Sanad office 4 minutes.

That sounds trivial. Here's the math:

— Average Sanad office: 20 client companies
— Average active cases per client: 3–5
— Average status calls per client per week: 2

That's 40–50 status calls per week. At 4 minutes each: 160–200 minutes.

2.5 to 3 hours per week answering questions about information you already have.

13 hours per month. 156 hours per year. Nearly a full month of working time spent on calls that add zero value to either party.

The client doesn't want to call. They call because they have no other way to know.

Give them a portal. One screen. Real-time case status. No call needed.

The Sanad offices we work with report that client status calls dropped by over 80% within the first month of going live.

That's not a product pitch. That's arithmetic.

#SanadOffice #PRO #OmanBusiness #SmartPROHub #Oman
